description.brazilian: Conclua uma corrida sem que seu companheiro sofra dano
description.english: Complete a run without your companion taking any damage
description.french: Terminer un run sans que votre compagnon ne subisse de dégâts
description.german: Schließe einen Run ab, ohne dass dein Gefährte Schaden nimmt
description.italian: Completa una corsa senza che il compagno subisca danni
description.japanese: 仲間がダメージを受けずにランを完了せよ
description.koreana: 동료가 피해를 받지 않고 런을 완료하라
description.latam: Completa una carrera sin que tu compañero reciba daño
description.russian: Завершите забег так, чтобы напарник не получил урона
description.schinese: 在同伴不受任何伤害的情况下完成通关
description.spanish: Completa una carrera sin que tu compañero reciba daño
description.tchinese: 在同伴不受任何傷害的情況下完成通關
description.turkish: Yoldaşın hasar almadan bir run'ı tamamla

description.brazilian: Deixe seu companheiro morrer nos primeiros 2 minutos e conclua a corrida
description.english: Let companion die in the first 2 minutes and then complete the run
description.french: Laissez votre compagnon mourir dans les 2 premières minutes puis terminez
description.german: Lass den Gefährten in den ersten 2 Min. sterben und schließe den Run ab
description.italian: Lascia morire il compagno nei primi 2 minuti e poi completa il run
description.japanese: 最初の2分以内に仲間を死なせてからランを完了せよ
description.koreana: 첫 2분 안에 동료를 죽게 두고 런을 완료하라
description.latam: Deja que tu compañero muera en los primeros 2 minutos y luego completa la carrera
description.russian: Позвольте напарнику погибнуть в первые 2 минуты и завершите забег
description.schinese: 让同伴在前2分钟内阵亡后完成通关
description.spanish: Deja que tu compañero muera en los primeros 2 minutos y luego completa la carrera
description.tchinese: 讓同伴在前2分鐘內陣亡後完成通關
description.turkish: İlk 2 dakikada yoldaşının ölmesine izin ver ve run'ı tamamla
